description: 910B4-1 configuration for qwen3-7b/qwen7b model profiling. It keeps the 910B4 AI Core/Vector Core counts inferred from Block Num while using the user-confirmed 1.6 TB/s HBM bandwidth for this platform slice.

sources.aic_num: qwen3-7b/qwen7b profiling MatMulV2 Block Num observed mostly as 20, matching 910B4 cube-side block count
sources.aiv_num: qwen3-7b/qwen7b vector-like rows reach Block Num 40, matching 2x cube-side block count
sources.hbm_bandwidth_tbps: user confirmed qwen3-7b should use 910B4-1 with 1.6 TB/s bandwidth
sources.cache_sizes: carried from Ascend910B4 configuration until a dedicated 910B4-1 platform config is available
sources.peak_tflops: carried from Ascend910B4 configuration; this change only separates HBM bandwidth for qwen3-7b

advanced_tiling.notes: 910B4-1 keeps the same non-advanced host tiling path as 910B4; only platform bandwidth differs for the qwen3-7b profiling baseline.

quant_matmul.description: Inherited QuantBatchMatmulV3 platform defaults from 910B4. qwen3-7b profiling currently exercises ordinary MatMulV2 and FIA paths.
